_comment: PTF-PROD-001 committed fixture data for the controlled hotel-profile fixtures. Transcribed verbatim from repository-authorized verified importer candidates so the renderer/runner/tests are reproducible in a clean checkout without the gitignored operational data/ tree. No fact is invented; values match the operational evidence exactly.

no_pets.evidence_quote: NO Pets Allowed, Service Animals Welcome
no_pets.name: Columbus Hilliard Hotel

days inn by wyndham grove city columbus.evidence_quote: The property identifies itself as pet-friendly. Confirm current fees and restrictions directly with the business.

drury inn and suites columbus grove city.evidence_quote: Dogs and cats are accepted. A $50 fee applies per room per day. A maximum of 2 pets is allowed. Pets may not exceed 80 lb.

sonesta columbus downtown.evidence_quote: A $75 fee applies per stay. A maximum of 2 pets is allowed. Guests must be 21 years of age or older to check into the hotel.

facts.general_restrictions: Guests must be 21 years of age or older to check into the hotel.

the plaza hotel columbus at capitol squa.evidence_quote: The property identifies itself as pet-friendly. Confirm current fees and restrictions directly with the business.
